/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT IN COURT/X:DA APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:CHARLES BROWN AND AGENT HUNTER ADDRESS THE COURT/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR IS PRESENT,/ /X: COURT REQUESTS A WRITTEN REPORT FROM AGENT HUNTER,/CONT/DOPU:DEFENDANT IS IN A PROGRAM/

/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR & DA APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:PDUPDATED THE COURT STATING THAT DEFENDANT IS AT THE PROVIDENCE  PROGRAM ANDHAS CONTACT WITH PAROLE AGENT HUNTER/X:COURT ORDERS AGENT HUNTER TO BE PRESENT AT THE NEXT COURT APPEARANCE TO UPDATE THE COURT/ /CONT/

/CAL:STATUS OF PROGRAM & DISCHARGE DATE/NP/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAN APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANT'S DISCHARGE DATE IS 05-31-2022/X:COURT REQUEST FOR PAROLE AGENT TO PROVIDE COURT WITH MENTAL HEALTH DIAGNOSIS, MENTAL HEALTH NEEDS AND PAROLE'S PLAN TO MEET THOSE NEEDS/X:CDCR TO PRODUCE RECORDSOF DISCHARGE DATES/CONT/

/CAL:STATUS OF PROGRAM/X:PAROLEE SHANAY JONES APPEARANCE WAIVED TODAY/DAWT/X:JUDGE ROECA AND PD IN THE COURTROOM/X:DA AND PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN VIA ZOOM/X:COURT REQUESTED AGENT ABAKAN TO ASK AGENT HUNTER TO  PROVIDEA WRITTEN REPORT ABOUT THE PAROLEE'S TREATMENT STATUS NEXT DATE/X:COURT WOULD LIKE AGENT HUNBER APPEAR NEXT DATE VIA ZOOM/CONTD: STATUS OF PROGRAMAND STATUS OF DISCHARGE DATE/

/CAL:PRETRIAL (PAROLE) AND STATUS OF PROGRAM/X:PAROLEE SHANAY JONES IN PROVIDENCE PROGRAM AND APPEARANCE WAIVED TODAY/DAWT/X:JUDGE ROECA AND PD IN THE COURTROOM/X:DA AND PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR VIA ZOOM/CONTD: STATUS OFPROGRAM AND STATUS OF DISCHARGE DATE/X:APPEARANCE  WAIVEDNEXT DATE IF IN PROGRAM/

/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CAL: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE(PAROLE)/DAWF/DEF: IS STILL IN A PROGRAM/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE (PAROLE) & STATUS OF PROGRAM 03-10-22 IN DEPT 31/DAWF/DEF: APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF STILL IN THE PROGRAM/
/CTORD: DEFENDANT BE TRANSPORTED TO CAMEO HOUSE, COLLABORATIVE ORDER SIGNED/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/OR/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:DA 3056 PETITION TO REVOKE (PAROLE)/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/X:DDA ARMANDO MIRANDA ALSO APPEARING,/CONTD DA PTR HEARING-(PAROLE)/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/CTORD:PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/4011,5/CTORD:JAIL MEDICAL SERVICES AND J HUNTER TO PROVIDE INFORMATION TO THE COURT REGARDING BIRTH PLANS FOR THE PAROLEE, INCLUDING SERVICES PROVIDED, AS WELL AS ACCESS TO AND CONTACT WITH THE BABY AFTER BIRTH/CONTD:VERIFICATION OF MEDICAL CONDITION AND RECONSIDERATION OF REQUEST FORRELEASE/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/DAWT/X:AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/CONT/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:PAROLE CASE MANAGER CHARLES BROWN IS PRESENT,/CONT/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/NP/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT VIA ZOOM/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/DAWT/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/CONT/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM/DAWT/CONTD:PAROLE PHC & DISCUSSION ON TREATMENT PROGRAM/
/CAL:STATUS OF PROGRAM/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAN APPEARING VIA ZOOM/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IS AT PROVIDENCE AND DOING WELL/CONTD:PAROLE PHC/DOP/
